---
title: 'Letter from Betty Wolfe, 02/12/2004'
date: '2004-02-12T09:16:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe Family Tree'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4222122000685892456'
blogger_filename: '/2004/12/letter-from-betty-wolfe-02122004.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe Family Tree/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-1-letter-pg1-db673e2b3382.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1232" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-1-letter-pg1-4437c61bc2bf.jpg" width="491" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-2-letter-pg2-edf8ae5b5d1f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1228" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-2-letter-pg2-50e0b3629c42.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/poem-1-d4e9f882c21a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1225" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/poem-1-2ea5b1066c20.jpg" width="488" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/poem-2-47849e8ad5b5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1233" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/poem-2-806bc5b902ee.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/poem-3-175cfa0a91ef.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1243" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/poem-3-0dca181efa52.jpg" width="496" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-1-e0053d89cda6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1227" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-1-7e3ccbee8ef8.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-2-d5dc3a820716.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1232" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-2-0f258027dc11.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-3-67efca88a43d.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1234" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-don-2c-lawrence-2c-26-john-wolfe-3-76beac632050.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-donald-f-wolfe-28my-grandfather-29-1-5f55224f50fd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1213" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-donald-f-wolfe-28my-grandfather-29-1-d19c0160baa2.jpg" width="484" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-donald-f-wolfe-28my-grandfather-29-2-4e5f169035ad.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1231" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-donald-f-wolfe-28my-grandfather-29-2-2e2d89ddecc6.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-betty-wolfe-pics-1-1c6c117fcdb1.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1235" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-betty-wolfe-pics-1-852d8e6b9c00.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-betty-wolfe-pics-2-aeb2779b90cd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1217" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-betty-wolfe-pics-2-e1c4f1d0035a.jpg" width="486" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-lillie-wolfe-pics-6a6cfadd29b6.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1225" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-26-lillie-wolfe-pics-10d648bef267.jpg" width="488" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-a-26-lillie-m-wolfe-c90cb2495218.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1221" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-a-26-lillie-m-wolfe-87f3e5d18b18.jpg" width="488" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-w-wolfe-1-7a19a7f146dd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1215" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-w-wolfe-1-8f9267aea487.jpg" width="484" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-w-wolfe-2-7a5818a24d0f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1229" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-john-w-wolfe-2-9039da65c919.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-laurence-w-wolfe-28don-27s-brother-29-1-fc08b8e2926b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1229" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-laurence-w-wolfe-28don-27s-brother-29-1-a6ce1335f8ee.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-laurence-w-wolfe-28don-27s-brother-29-2-7222e2e17133.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1233" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-laurence-w-wolfe-28don-27s-brother-29-2-06704e42d6c5.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-laurence-w-wolfe-28don-27s-brother-29-3-0172f93113c0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1221" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-laurence-w-wolfe-28don-27s-brother-29-3-f083e990b1f2.jpg" width="488" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-1-92c56e99bb9f.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1228" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-1-5acfcdea0d5b.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-2-ba2b6ddec150.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1214" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-2-3c0d60c7430b.jpg" width="484" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-1-df1bb262dc14.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1225" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-1-de95650fceb4.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-2-191f03aaa70b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1227" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-2-e1fb6b74adaa.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-4-0d95b4f17f42.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1232" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-4-e239d599d5ff.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-5-8c1eaa5d7ef9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1229" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-5-823ac47ca489.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-6-cb1373f8fc4c.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1222" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-6-8a945ad49331.jpg" width="488" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-5-630213bde4ac.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1221" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-5-0d8d224a41d9.jpg" width="488" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-6-1ca7409943f0.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1229" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-6-1f800b53b946.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-7-88422e6b3b74.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1223" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-7-d9476419d277.jpg" width="488" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-8-28and-kids-29-dbbaea282ce4.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1226" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-8-28and-kids-29-e19c42f57491.jpg" width="490" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-9-605ba6e984dc.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1240" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-9-2ab4da462ad7.jpg" width="496" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-11-28his-brothers-29-d7d835dc7589.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1232" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-11-28his-brothers-29-6511aca87a2e.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-l-wolfe-2c-jr-28ii-29-brother-of-don-wolfe-1-f4c161878c43.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1231" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-l-wolfe-2c-jr-28ii-29-brother-of-don-wolfe-1-947cb89ac681.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-l-wolfe-2c-jr-28ii-29-brother-of-don-wolfe-2-bb7ab7aee9ad.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1230" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-l-wolfe-2c-jr-28ii-29-brother-of-don-wolfe-2-d1e141276bad.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-3-b561f8214185.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1232" data-original-width="1600" height="492" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-3-8fd5b0458e4c.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-3-3328193af2c9.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1227" data-original-width="1600" height="490" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-4-3-ec3449572377.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-10-28his-brothers-29-e8ee56451370.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1232" data-original-width="1600" height="492" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-roy-26-esther-wolfe-10-28his-brothers-29-5de18e7d0c2d.jpg" width="640" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
